textByHash.06aeba87d2bfe1f9f616cd60c5b887a6b917e4a9: The voices tell me different. It's all part of a plot! Confess!
textByHash.22af9b877b067dc8fb62449aa86e7df044d4add0: On a completely unrelated note, I would steer clear of Hungry Frank for a while.
textByHash.2c6081ee7d45be2022eb722f3cd3df10c0acd096: No, I've spent most of my time in the toilet to be honest.
textByHash.37ae5c9b4ecc68bef9a5bcfb9b9d59d0e5584ee6: I no sleep in many, many, many days.
textByHash.3a04b3000c500c5bc00aadf4ecd57dc87719fcfa: I don't have anything to reward you with except my collection of bleak, gothic poetry I wrote when I assumed we were all done for. Do you want it?
textByHash.3bf57649eb629de4583b9d58d6f27af16f27c969: So what are you then? A ghoul? A vampyre?
textByHash.3db99db35827b2dd630545328d5659e28c4736f9: Yes! I was so confident that I would never, ever have sold your soft, edible body to the pirates outside!
textByHash.48c5cbee899c2c5f729a7348d23e68963aafcb94: You're one of THEM, aren't you!
textByHash.61d75e91cef8ae3cb62468219ee077c4be5ce826: Oh Guthix, who am I kidding?
textByHash.6216559026ea02519f9c9261a7fea9f3e47e3d42: That I've been crawling into the corner to cry whenever nobody is looking.
textByHash.670224706301586d1aa127d1a15664904bf5a4fe: I don't know what your game is, but I know you're one of THEM!
textByHash.77c567fa5b242d0fdb2423799ec97eef035dd170: Don't talk to me! If I play this right, I can sell you lot out and make it to the mainland!
textByHash.8766865a8f3bdad0f0dc731c507b79918500741c: No school today mother, my brain hurts real baaaad...
textByHash.8ab65bfa673fcac216fc1e666426c657768e6f9d: My brain is no longer capable of sleep.
textByHash.9e50fb9990d61d7a156ba44c7acb8c4bba1f2378: What are we gonna do now, huh? What are we gunna do now?
textByHash.9ef8ba794ea43554d0e928e7490287aad70e65b4: Oh...oh god I'm sorry, I didn't realise it was natural...
textByHash.9f5b0ef0065ea50953bc1adec6e9a7f71181cec9: I bet ye've never had to beat a dozen zombies to death with a blunt toothpick!
textByHash.a08198ca9e0314e505653dfc63dd3d524240118a: Don't you know there's a war on?
textByHash.a5a99cfc06c6f4d8a630dbbcdbd8cb9b37e43e76: He's a filthy liar. And a forger. It wouldn't surprise me if he has written out a note detailing the terms of our surrender and your dismemberment and cooking in MY handwriting.
textByHash.b19a92c1bf4e09873ffeafaedf75fa2670812d46: Hello there, brave hero, in whom I had total confidence!
textByHash.b31e372db24f6405c3bb2c4ac0a9d68f006cd676: Don't sneak up on me like that!
textByHash.c22e8eff3a267ba9967a39ddb4d05ea2461f37f1: I think that would be for the best!
textByHash.c695216898d1c00c3e36d6b10bdf60651c7c017c: How do I know you're not one of them?
textByHash.cb526461b9bbbf3ecb2a84721dc2d5d0e244fbce: Well you proved that you're probably not a zombie.
textByHash.d06c45de5048b94db9a910b0698e56838b2ff220: I was gonna try and will myself dead.
